'''zhadusu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:iambist|iambist]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-d-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:iambist|iambist]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zhadusu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhædisith|zhædisith]] || [[word:zhædisij|zhædisij]] || [[word:zhædisish|zhædisish]] || [[word:zhædisi|zhædisi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhadudusuth|zhadudusuth]] || [[word:zhadudusuj|zhadudusuj]] || [[word:zhadudusush|zhadudusush]] || [[word:zhadudusu|zhadudusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhadusuth|zhadusuth]] || [[word:zhadusuj|zhadusuj]] || [[word:zhadusush|zhadusush]] || [[word:zhadusu|zhadusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhadufsuth|zhadufsuth]] || [[word:zhadufsuj|zhadufsuj]] || [[word:zhadufsush|zhadufsush]] || [[word:zhadufsuf|zhadufsuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhadusuthu|zhadusuthu]] || [[word:zhadusuju|zhadusuju]] || [[word:zhadusushu|zhadusushu]] || [[word:zhadusuku|zhadusuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhadusuth|zhadusuth]] || [[word:zhadusuj|zhadusuj]] || [[word:zhadusush|zhadusush]] || [[word:zhadusu|zhadusu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhadusuthul|zhadusuthul]] || [[word:zhadusujul|zhadusujul]] || [[word:zhadusushul|zhadusushul]] || [[word:zhadusukul|zhadusukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhadusuthuthu|zhadusuthuthu]] || [[word:zhadusujuju|zhadusujuju]] || [[word:zhadusushushu|zhadusushushu]] || [[word:zhadusuku|zhadusuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhadusuthun|zhadusuthun]] || [[word:zhadusujun|zhadusujun]] || [[word:zhadusushun|zhadusushun]] || [[word:zhadusukun|zhadusukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhadusuthuoro|zhadusuthuoro]] || [[word:zhadusujuoro|zhadusujuoro]] || [[word:zhadusushuoro|zhadusushuoro]] || [[word:zhadusukuoro|zhadusukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
